caption: A man with a dark beard and short dark hair, wearing a light gray button-down shirt, speaks directly to the camera. He is positioned in front of a dark blue background featuring a repeating, faint watermark pattern of the words "DAILY ROUND-UP." In the upper left corner of the scene, a white logo for "peoples dispatch" is visible. To the right of the man, a smaller inset video window displays a hand holding a yellow sign. The text on the sign reads "ISRAEL CRIMINEL !", "NON", "NON FRANCE COMPLICE", and "BOYCOTT ISRAEL !". Throughout the sequence, the man remains centered, gesturing slightly with his hands and moving his mouth as he speaks. The inset image of the hand holding the yellow sign remains static, while the man's facial expressions and slight posture shifts indicate he is in the middle of a presentation or report.
